sentences.translation: Istinoljubivost je plemenit moral u islamu.
sentences.translationEn: Truthfulness is a great character trait in Islam.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّ الصِّدْقَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ، وَإِنَّ الْبِرَّ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ، حَدِيثُ ٦٠٩٤].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Zaista istina vodi ka dobročinstvu, a dobročinstvo vodi u Džennet' [Buhari].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: 'Indeed, truthfulness leads to righteousness, and righteousness leads to Paradise' [Reported by al-Bukhari].

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يَقُولَ الْحَقَّ دَائِمًا فِي حَيَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman mora uvijek govoriti istinu u svom životu.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim must always speak the truth in his life.

sentences.arabic: الصِّدْقُ يَبْنِي الثِّقَةَ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ وَيَنْشُرُ الْمَحَبَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Iskrenost gradi povjerenje među ljudima i širi ljubav.
sentences.translationEn: Honesty builds trust between people and spreads love.

sentences.arabic: مَنْ كَانَ صَادِقًا، أَحَبَّهُ اللهُ وَأَحَبَّهُ النَّاسُ جَمِيعًا.
sentences.translation: Ko bude iskren, voljet će ga Allah i voljet će ga svi ljudi.
sentences.translationEn: Whoever is truthful will be loved by Allah and by all people.
